title: Oreocharis acaulis

intro: Oreocharis acaulis is a type of flowering plant in the gentian family, characterized by its unique, stemless habit and white or purple flowers. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Oreocharis acaulis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
